description_long: This house features a complex, multi-tiered hip roof with dark gray shingles and wide overhangs, giving it a distinctive, modern appearance. The structure is composed of several interlocking rectangular volumes, with prominent horizontal lines and layered roof sections. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically along the facade, allowing for ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The front entryway is marked by a covered porch supported by two columns, providing a sheltered approach. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of white and gray, enhancing the geometric design. The overall form suggests a spacious, multi-story residence with a focus on modern architectural elements.
description: A modern, multi-story house with a layered hip roof, wide overhangs, and large asymmetrical windows. The exterior features white and gray finishes with a prominent covered entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, two supporting columns, and large windows beneath the layered roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended roof overhangs, stepped volumes, and a mix of window sizes along the facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the broad, uninterrupted hip roof and horizontal bands of windows and wall sections.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the multi-level roof structure, staggered wall sections, and additional window placements.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with two columns, steps leading to a recessed main door, and a wide overhang for shelter.
